title: boltonia latisquama var. decurrens
intro: Boltonia latisquama var. decurrens, also known as false aster, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and sesquiterpene lactones. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Boltonia latisquama var. decurrens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also employed in traditional folk medicine for its purgative and expectorant properties.
